title: RAT v3 plugin manifest — kind: format (rat/1)
description: Per-kind manifest schema for `kind: format` (ADR-011). Composes the kind-agnostic envelope (plugin.v1.json) via `allOf` and adds the per-kind constraints: `kind` is fixed to "format", and `provides` MUST contain this kind's minimal mandatory core (`rat://format/v1/scan`). The `format` axis also defines `append`, `merge`, `overwrite`, `maintain` — those are OPTIONAL (capability negotiation: a plugin implements only the subset it supports).
$comment: Layered per ADR-011. Strictness = minimal mandatory core (NOT all capabilities): negotiation means a plugin implements a subset. The orchestrating core that ENFORCES `provides` at runtime (C5) is not built yet (Phase 1) — see plugin.v1.json $comment.
